chunks.title: Exercise 6 - Library Management System in Python
chunks.text: What's up guys, today we will do another exercise

chunks.text: And I want everyone to solve this exercise

chunks.title: Exercise 6 - Library Management System in Python
chunks.text: Let's get started

chunks.title: Exercise 6 - Library Management System in Python
chunks.text: So I have come back with an exercise

chunks.title: Exercise 6 - Library Management System in Python
chunks.text: And you have to make a library class

chunks.title: Exercise 6 - Library Management System in Python
chunks.text: You have to make a class library

chunks.title: Exercise 6 - Library Management System in Python
chunks.text: In which you can make some variables and methods

chunks.title: Exercise 6 - Library Management System in Python
chunks.text: You have to make two variables, one is number of books

chunks.title: Exercise 6 - Library Management System in Python
chunks.text: And one is books

chunks.title: Exercise 6 - Library Management System in Python
chunks.text: Books will be a list, I am telling you

chunks.title: Exercise 6 - Library Management System in Python
chunks.text: And this is an integer, how many books are there

chunks.title: Exercise 6 - Library Management System in Python
chunks.text: As you will add books with the help of methods

chunks.title: Exercise 6 - Library Management System in Python
chunks.text: Similarly, the number of books variable should be an increment

chunks.title: Exercise 6 - Library Management System in Python
chunks.text: Now I know that the number of books variable

chunks.title: Exercise 6 - Library Management System in Python
chunks.text: There was no need for this, because we can make it by len of books

chunks.title: Exercise 6 - Library Management System in Python
chunks.text: But still you have to make it and make a method

chunks.title: Exercise 6 - Library Management System in Python
chunks.text: Which will check that the number of books is equal to len of books

chunks.title: Exercise 6 - Library Management System in Python
chunks.text: And if this does not happen

chunks.title: Exercise 6 - Library Management System in Python
chunks.text: Then it will tell that your program

chunks.title: Exercise 6 - Library Management System in Python
chunks.text: There is something wrong in it because your number of books and books

chunks.title: Exercise 6 - Library Management System in Python
chunks.text: Which is different, in the same way you can make two or three libraries

chunks.title: Exercise 6 - Library Management System in Python
chunks.text: From library class to library 1, library 2, library 3

chunks.title: Exercise 6 - Library Management System in Python
chunks.text: And you finish this program and at the end of this I have asked a question

chunks.title: Exercise 6 - Library Management System in Python
chunks.text: That does your program persist the books you have entered

chunks.title: Exercise 6 - Library Management System in Python
chunks.text: After stopping the program

chunks.title: Exercise 6 - Library Management System in Python
chunks.text: Means those books remain in the memory or not

chunks.title: Exercise 6 - Library Management System in Python
chunks.text: And the answer to this is very simple, I will not tell you

chunks.title: Exercise 6 - Library Management System in Python
chunks.text: But you guys see it yourself, I want you to feel it yourself

chunks.title: Exercise 6 - Library Management System in Python
chunks.text: And make me a library class

chunks.title: Exercise 6 - Library Management System in Python
chunks.text: Very minimal object oriented programming program

chunks.title: Exercise 6 - Library Management System in Python
chunks.text: So I will give you very little time to make it

chunks.title: Exercise 6 - Library Management System in Python
chunks.text: So the solution to this exercise will come very soon

chunks.title: Exercise 6 - Library Management System in Python
chunks.text: So if you have not seen the video on time

chunks.title: Exercise 6 - Library Management System in Python
chunks.text: Then press the bell, whatever you do, watch the video on time

chunks.title: Exercise 6 - Library Management System in Python
chunks.text: Secondly, this program should be like this

chunks.title: Exercise 6 - Library Management System in Python
chunks.text: Whatever I am talking about in the video, your Apple should be open

chunks.title: Exercise 6 - Library Management System in Python
chunks.text: Your Apple should be open and your program should start

chunks.title: Exercise 6 - Library Management System in Python
chunks.text: So you guys start working

chunks.title: Exercise 6 - Library Management System in Python
chunks.text: After watching the video, but if you have not accessed it yet

chunks.title: Exercise 6 - Library Management System in Python
chunks.text: Then do it and do one thing for me

chunks.title: Exercise 6 - Library Management System in Python
chunks.text: That in the first video you guys write a review

chunks.title: Exercise 6 - Library Management System in Python
chunks.text: About this course and if you write a review

chunks.title: Exercise 6 - Library Management System in Python
chunks.text: Then I will feel good from the heart because whoever is a new student

chunks.text: Who wants to see this course, how much benefit will this course give them

chunks.text: They will know this thing that if they

chunks.text: If they see your review, then I want you to review this course

chunks.title: Exercise 6 - Library Management System in Python
chunks.text: And if you do this

chunks.title: Exercise 6 - Library Management System in Python
chunks.text: Then I will feel very good from the heart, rest you guys

chunks.title: Exercise 6 - Library Management System in Python
chunks.text: Do solve this question and I am saying again

chunks.title: Exercise 6 - Library Management System in Python
chunks.text: I am not going to give this question in a lot of time

chunks.title: Exercise 6 - Library Management System in Python
chunks.text: So I will give you the answer to this question very soon

chunks.title: Exercise 6 - Library Management System in Python
chunks.text: So don't say that you didn't give time
